overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Avatar: Frontiers of Pandora showing a Na'vi character exploring an underground resistance base. The character walks through industrial corridors with fabric canopies, enters a high-tech command center with holographic displays, and continues through utility tunnels to a workshop area.

scene_state.functional_zone: main base corridor with fabric canopies and living spaces

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the base corridor alongside a Na'vi companion

notable_agents.action: walking ahead through the corridor leading the way

entered.detail: tan fabric draped across the ceiling creating a canopy effect
metal barrel with a triangular warning sign attached
green potted plants placed along the left wall
colorful cushions and mats on the floor for seating

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a Na'vi character walking through a warmly lit underground base corridor with fabric canopies overhead. The character follows a companion through an area mixed with industrial elements like pipes and barrels alongside living spaces with cushions and potted plants.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-tech command center with holographic display

events.description: entering the high-tech command center with holographic map table and multiple monitors

agents.ego_description: approaching and examining the holographic command table in the center of the room

entered.detail: circular table projecting a blue holographic terrain map
large circular overhead light fixture with radial slats
wall of glowing computer screens displaying data and maps
transparent glass walls separating the command center from adjacent areas

segments.scene_description: The character enters a high-tech command center featuring a prominent holographic map table surrounded by computer monitors. The lighting shifts to cooler tones with blue glows from the screens, and the space is more open and industrial compared to the previous corridor.

events.description: exiting the command center back into the corridor area with glass observation windows

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor past a Na'vi working at a computer terminal behind glass

notable_agents.action: working at a computer terminal visible through a glass partition

entered.detail: large glass window looking into an adjacent work area
desk with multiple computer monitors and a chair
tall metal shelves with various equipment and boxes

segments.scene_description: Exiting the command center, the character returns to corridor areas with glass observation windows overlooking workstations. The companion reappears and walks alongside as they pass by a Na'vi working at a computer terminal.

scene_state.functional_zone: utility corridor with exposed piping and storage

events.description: entering narrower utility corridor with exposed pipes and industrial equipment

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow utility corridor following the companion

notable_agents.action: walking ahead through the narrow corridor

entered.detail: yellow and blue pipes running along the ceiling and walls
arched concrete doorway at the end of the corridor
stacked plastic crates and storage containers

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower utility corridor with exposed piping and industrial elements. The space is more confined with concrete walls and metal railings, creating a utilitarian atmosphere as the character follows the companion toward the next area.

scene_state.functional_zone: workshop and living area with crafting stations

events.description: entering the workshop area with crafting tables and hanging plants

agents.ego_description: walking through the workshop approaching a workbench where another character is working

notable_agents.action: standing at a workbench working on crafting materials

entered.detail: tan fabric draped overhead similar to the main corridor
large table with crafting materials and tools
plants and herbs hanging from the ceiling for drying
metal shelves holding various supplies and equipment

segments.scene_description: The character enters a workshop area with fabric canopies overhead and crafting stations. The space has a lived-in feel with hanging dried herbs, cushions, and workbenches. The companion approaches a workbench where another Na'vi is working, creating a social hub atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an underground resistance base that transitions from cozy living quarters to a high-tech hub and finally into a utilitarian workshop. It begins in a warmly lit corridor where industrial pipes blend with fabric canopies and potted plants, following a companion through a lived-in residential space. As the character enters a command center, the atmosphere shifts to a cooler, open industrial environment dominated by blue glows from computer monitors and a central holographic map table. The scene then moves back into corridors with glass observation windows and past active workstations before narrowing into a confined utility tunnel characterized by concrete walls and exposed piping. Finally, the camera opens up into a bustling workshop area where the industrial aesthetic softens again with hanging herbs and crafting stations, ending in a social hub centered around a shared workbench.
